stemHtml: To ensure that, in case of autopilot failure, flight path deviations remain within safe limits, when the autopilot is engaged which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: a pitch-up trim load is always maintained by the autopilot, ensuring the deviation when the autopilot disconnects is predictable and consistent.
options.b: a delay of 5 seconds occurs while the autopilot motors the auto-trim up and down, until the trim position has been identified.
options.c: when engaged the aircraft is in trim, with control loads very low.
options.d: trim is mechanically centred, ensuring that the full range of movement is available to the auto-trim system.
